tests.name: subscribe flow > homepage subscribe widget submits and shows success state
subscribe flow > submit button is disabled until consent checkbox is checked
subscribe flow > subscribe widget appears at the bottom of an archive detail page
legal pages > privacy page renders policy heading and key sections
legal pages > terms page renders terms heading and key sections
confirm page status states > success status shows confirmed message
confirm page status states > expired status shows expired message
confirm page status states > invalid status shows invalid message
unsubscribe page > success status shows unsubscribed confirmation
admin analytics page > redirects to login when unauthenticated
admin analytics page > renders metric cards and date controls when logged in

notes: Subscribe POST is stubbed via Playwright route interception because the configured RESEND_API_KEY is a placeholder; unit tests cover the API + email-provider + template logic with real mocks.
Real-DB persistence of subscribers (with confirm_token issued) was verified manually before the test run by hitting /api/subscribe via curl and inspecting the subscribers table.
gaps: Real SES/Resend email delivery is not exercised end-to-end (RESEND_API_KEY placeholder; no SES credentials wired for tests).
SNS webhook receipt + signature verification (POST /api/webhooks/ses) is covered by unit tests only, not by an e2e HTTP round-trip.
The full daily newsletter send pipeline (BullMQ send-newsletter worker -> per-subscriber email -> email_sends row -> SES event ingestion) is not exercised end-to-end.

Confirm-token + unsubscribe-token round-trip via real /api/confirm and /api/unsubscribe links is covered by unit tests but not driven through the browser e2e (would require valid HMAC tokens and a successful confirmation send).
Analytics aggregation with non-zero data is not exercised — the e2e test asserts the dashboard renders metric cards on an empty dataset only.
